rationale: The previous attempt's `assert forall` blocks let verus auto-pick low-confidence triggers (`pre.proc_dom().contains(c_ptr)`), so the asserted foralls never lined up with `det_<f>_equal`'s forall conjuncts whose triggers are `post{1,2}_self_.get_X(p)`. We add explicit dual `#![trigger post1_self_.get_X(p)] #![trigger post2_self_.get_X(p)]` annotations on every forall (proc/container/thread/endpoint) so the merged-side forall fires whenever the goal mentions either post, and we re-prove every per-field, domain, and page_closure equality on both sides plus the merged conclusion to give z3 a fully aligned context.
